title: Release Notes for Safari Technology Preview 248
excerpt: Safari Technology Preview Release 248 is now available for download for macOS Golden Gate and macOS Tahoe.
content_html:
Safari Technology Preview Release 248 is now available for download for macOS Golden Gate and macOS Tahoe. If you already have Safari Technology Preview installed, you can update it in System Settings under General → Software Update.

This release includes WebKit changes between: 315567@main…316817@main.

Accessibility

Resolved Issues

  • Fixed VoiceOver on Safari unable to navigate to content revealed by disclosure widgets using hidden="until-found". (315964@main) (173228707)
  • Fixed stale aria-labelledby when the referenced element dynamically changes its aria-label. (316316@main) (180319221)

CSS

New Features

  • Added support for forwarding missing color components when interpolating between analogous color spaces. (315569@main) (180239320)
  • Added support for the no-clamp option on the CSS progress() function. (315977@main) (180473472)

Resolved Issues

  • Fixed serialization of various CSS at-rules not escaping identifiers. (315795@main) (178750383)
  • Fixed :last-child and related selectors incorrectly gating on parser state outside of style resolution. (316495@main) (178879939)
  • Fixed changing the color-scheme of an <iframe> not invalidating the appearance of the embedded document. (316467@main) (179177141)
  • Fixed CSS scroll snap re-snap to prefer the fragment-targeted (:target) snap area over other aligned snap targets. (315880@main) (180108825)
  • Fixed the CSS preload scanner failing to preload @import rules that follow an @layer statement rule. (315576@main) (180170656)
  • Fixed serialization of CSSViewTransitionRule. (315614@main) (180170814)
  • Fixed MediaList.deleteMedium() to parse its argument as a media query and remove all matching queries. (315579@main) (180270019)
  • Fixed MediaList.appendMedium() to parse its argument as a single media query and suppress duplicates. (315594@main) (180291283)
  • Fixed grid items with stretch or fit-content preferred sizes computing incorrect minimum-content contributions when sizing tracks. (316296@main) (180748205)
  • Fixed inserting a CSS rule while a view transition is active causing the group animation to snap to its final state. (316436@main) (181100818)
  • Fixed CSS var() to only resolve its fallback when the first argument resolves to the guaranteed-invalid value. (316280@main) (181114298)
  • Fixed navigating away from a render-blocked document before its first rendering opportunity incorrectly firing pagereveal and starting an outbound cross-document view transition. (316446@main) (181191512)

Editing

Resolved Issues

  • Fixed drag images of DOM elements with CSS transforms not rendering correctly. (316077@main) (99614217)
  • Fixed opaque DOM mutations coming from dictation on iOS. (316049@main) (163454428)
  • Fixed deletion in an editable table leaving an empty trailing table row behind. (315990@main) (180877315)
  • Fixed vertical caret movement in editable content ignoring the requested editable-type parameter. (316241@main) (181000174)

Forms

Resolved Issues

  • Fixed the concentric inner-button corner radius on horizontal text form controls incorrectly ignoring the bottom inset. (316022@main) (180869927)

Images

Resolved Issues

  • Fixed a regression where RGB gain map images were decoded to 8 bits per channel, causing a color shift and incorrect brightness. (316069@main) (179152566)
  • Fixed handling of the gain-map target pixel format when decoding HDR images to fall back safely when the format cannot be parsed. (316405@main) (181180757)

JavaScript

New Features

  • Added support for the TC39 BigInt Math proposal, exposing Math-equivalent methods on BigInt such as BigInt.pow and BigInt.sqrt. (315974@main) (152472996)

Media

Resolved Issues

  • Fixed <audio> and <video> controls rendering incorrectly when rotated via CSS transform. (315718@main) (37516619)
  • Fixed subtitles and closed captions not appearing in fullscreen video on iPhone. (315789@main) (175298523)
  • Fixed ArrayBuffer-backed YUV VideoFrame with a visibleRect rendering with offset chroma channels. (315742@main) (180202939)
  • Fixed video playback of streams from certain sources such as security cameras not working. (315774@main) (180411019)
  • Fixed transient device rotation resulting in captured video frames having the wrong orientation. (315821@main) (180429147)
  • Fixed Media Source Extensions playback and seek by loosening the gap tolerance between buffered ranges. (316146@main) (180439090)

Navigation

Resolved Issues

  • Fixed a <meta http-equiv="refresh"> to a URL differing only in fragment identifier being incorrectly treated as a page reload. (316001@main) (176933795)

Networking

Resolved Issues

  • Fixed URL path separators being encoded as %2F following a percent-encoded Armenian path segment. (315627@main) (180067095)

Rendering

Resolved Issues

  • Fixed the background of a composited <html> element not being repainted when the <body> background changed. (316415@main) (177975964)
  • Fixed a regression where block-axis padding on a flex column container with overflow: auto was excluded from scrollHeight. (315813@main) (179376053)
  • Fixed an issue where an <img> embedding an SVG with a near-integral intrinsic width rendered one device pixel narrower than expected. (315807@main) (180490343)
  • Fixed elements with filter: drop-shadow() not being fully repainted when a child is resized. (316450@main) (181284741)

SVG

Resolved Issues

  • Fixed SVG SMIL length animations to reject invalid to, from, and by values such as those with leading whitespace. (315949@main) (118537155)
  • Fixed Unicode text with complex scripts not rendering correctly along a curved <textPath>. (316144@main) (120284006)
  • Fixed SVGLength.convertToSpecifiedUnits() failing when converting from px to %, em, or ex. (315953@main) (172056830)
  • Fixed SVG geometry presentation attributes like cx, cy, r, rx, ry, x, y, width, and height being incorrectly applied to elements such as <g> on which they are not permitted. (315946@main) (175672111)
  • Fixed an issue where the per-character rotate attribute was discarded on a <textPath>, so it now composes with the path tangent angle. (315786@main) (178044478)
  • Fixed several SVG styling spec-compliance failures. (316174@main) (181052042)
  • Fixed dynamic changes to orient and markerUnits on <marker> not repainting elements that reference it. (316350@main) (181106538)
  • Fixed SVG SMIL number, integer-optional-integer, number-optional-number, and path animations to not apply when their from, to, or by values fail to parse. (316468@main) (181308150)

Scrolling

Resolved Issues

  • Fixed CSS scroll snap points inside zero-sized elements not working correctly. (315948@main) (172863699)
  • Fixed CSS scroll snap re-snap to prefer a snap area that contains the focused or fragment-targeted element. (315927@main) (180707984)

Security

Resolved Issues

  • Fixed a regression where some websites failed to display and logged Content Security Policy errors in the console. (316290@main) (179684592)
  • Fixed same-page navigations being incorrectly checked against Content Security Policy. (315759@main) (180342503)
  • Fixed Content Security Policy frame-ancestors violations in report-only policies being ignored instead of reported. (315753@main) (180447621)
  • Fixed Content Security Policy parsing to reject trailing characters after the closing quote on nonce-source and hash-source values. (316008@main) (180903857)
  • Fixed Content Security Policy trusted-types expressions to reject trailing characters after keywords and the wildcard. (316089@main) (180973793)

Storage

Resolved Issues

  • Fixed an issue where IndexedDB transactions could be blocked for an extended period before starting when another page’s transaction was suspended in the background. (315609@main) (178769599)

Web API

Resolved Issues

  • Fixed the Async Clipboard API to request paste access asynchronously. (315997@main) (75969974)
  • Fixed Digital Credentials to surface OperationError for platform-cancellation and unknown errors instead of AbortError or UnknownError. (315973@main) (174308268)
  • Fixed Digital Credentials rejecting with the wrong error code and synchronously; rejections are now queued as a task with the correct error. (315895@main) (174895437)
  • Fixed KeyboardEvent.getModifierState("AltGraph") and MouseEvent.getModifierState("AltGraph") always returning false. (315804@main) (180597374)
  • Fixed Credential.type returning "digital-credential" instead of "digital" for digital credentials. (315891@main) (180618646)
  • Fixed aborting navigator.credentials.get() leaving the digital-credentials document picker stuck on screen. (316494@main) (180812397)
  • Fixed FileReader.readAsText() ignoring the charset parameter of the Blob‘s MIME type. (315996@main) (180890703)

Web Inspector

Resolved Issues

  • Fixed showing ES2022 class private fields, methods, and accessors when inspecting object instances in the Console. (316171@main) (88527162)
  • Fixed symbolic breakpoints in the debugger so they work with intrinsic functions. (315713@main) (99037335)
  • Fixed a JavaScript breakpoint on a line containing only a semicolon not being triggered. (316519@main) (126707973)
  • Fixed the Console REPL to allow redefinition of variables declared with let and const. (316523@main) (143140659)
  • Fixed the Timeline exporting and importing the wrong timestamp for performance.mark() records. (316073@main) (145226764)
  • Fixed local response overrides mapped to a file being interpreted as Latin-1 (ISO-8859-1) instead of their actual encoding. (316074@main) (149847746)
  • Fixed the Media Logging setting not persisting across page loads. (315758@main) (154766890)
  • Fixed symbolic breakpoints to work with native constructors such as Array, Date, EventTarget, and Worker. (316262@main) (157178256)
  • Fixed missing stack traces for MIME type errors when importing modules. (316529@main) (169396940)
  • Fixed the Accessibility sidebar being empty for nodes inside cross-origin iframes. (316399@main) (178562336)
  • Fixed inline style invalidation to batch DOM.getAttributes commands per tick in cross-origin iframes instead of issuing one command per node. (316487@main) (178830496)
  • Fixed DOM Storage read and write commands to resolve against the frame’s own origin in cross-origin iframes. (316501@main) (179249711)
  • Fixed a moved breakpoint reverting to its original location after closing and reopening Web Inspector. (315585@main) (180083858)
  • Fixed showing the formatted parameters string for prototype objects such as Map.prototype. (315599@main) (180298712)
  • Fixed missing formatted parameter strings for object shorthand methods and arrow functions. (315723@main) (180466459)
  • Fixed an unnecessary colon appearing in front of non-class function properties. (315731@main) (180476445)
  • Fixed a self-canceling ternary that produced an incorrect cross-axis direction in the flex overlay. (316429@main) (181198803)
  • Fixed the color picker force-converting picked colors to Display P3. (316419@main) (181201503)
  • Fixed Page.searchInResources silently omitting cache-backed resources from search results. (316421@main) (181202027)
  • Fixed duplicate invalid CSS declarations both incorrectly displaying as Active in the Styles sidebar. (316418@main) (181203080)
  • Fixed adopted constructable stylesheets being misclassified as User Agent stylesheets in cross-origin iframes. (316433@main) (181204768)
  • Fixed an unsigned underflow that caused the DOM agent to spuriously report power-efficient playback. (316443@main) (181205602)
  • Fixed Network.setExtraHTTPHeaders to replace previously set headers instead of accumulating them. (316444@main) (181282814)

WebDriver

New Features

  • Added WebDriver support for the Digital Credentials API, including commands to simulate wallet payloads, indefinite waits, and user rejection. (316435@main) (168941907)

WebRTC

Resolved Issues

  • Fixed the WebProcess AudioSession to remain active while microphone capture is live. (316394@main) (180505014)
  • Fixed the configurationchange event being dropped when a source-side change occurred while a MediaStreamTrack was muted; the event is now deferred until unmute. (316301@main) (180728609)
content_text: Safari Technology Preview Release 248 is now available for download for macOS Golden Gate and macOS Tahoe. If you already have Safari Technology Preview installed, you can update it in System Settings under General → Software Update. This release includes WebKit changes between: 315567@main…316817@main. Accessibility Resolved Issues Fixed VoiceOver on Safari unable to navigate to content revealed by disclosure widgets using hidden="until-found". (315964@main) (173228707) Fixed stale aria-labelledby when the referenced element dynamically changes its aria-label. (316316@main) (180319221) CSS New Features Added support for forwarding missing color components when interpolating between analogous color spaces. (315569@main) (180239320) Added support for the no-clamp option on the CSS progress() function. (315977@main) (180473472) Resolved Issues Fixed serialization of various CSS at-rules not escaping identifiers. (315795@main) (178750383) Fixed :last-child and related selectors incorrectly gating on parser state outside of style resolution. (316495@main) (178879939) Fixed changing the color-scheme of an

blocks.html_en: Safari Technology Preview Release 248 is now available for download for macOS Golden Gate and macOS Tahoe. If you already have Safari Technology Preview installed, you can update it in System Settings under General → Software Update.

sentences.en: Safari Technology Preview Release 248 is now available for download for macOS Golden Gate and macOS Tahoe.
sentences.zh: Safari 技术预览版 248 现已可供 macOS Golden Gate 和 macOS Tahoe 下载。

sentences.en: If you already have Safari Technology Preview installed, you can update it in System Settings under General → Software Update.
sentences.zh: 如果您已经安装了 Safari 技术预览版，您可以在“系统设置”中的“常规”→“软件更新”下进行更新。

blocks.html_en: This release includes WebKit changes between: 315567@main…316817@main.

sentences.en: This release includes WebKit changes between: 315567@main…316817@main.
sentences.zh: 此版本包括以下 WebKit 更改：315567@main…316817@main。

blocks.html_en: Accessibility
Resolved Issues
• Fixed VoiceOver on Safari unable to navigate to content revealed by disclosure widgets using hidden="until-found". (315964@main) (173228707)

sentences.en: Fixed VoiceOver on Safari unable to navigate to content revealed by disclosure widgets using hidden="until-found".
sentences.zh: 修复了 Safari 上的 VoiceOver 无法导航到使用 hide="until-found" 的公开小部件显示的内容的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed stale aria-labelledby when the referenced element dynamically changes its aria-label. (316316@main) (180319221)

sentences.en: Fixed stale aria-labelledby when the referenced element dynamically changes its aria-label.
sentences.zh: 当引用的元素动态更改其 aria-label 时，修复了过时的 aria-labelledby。

blocks.html_en: CSS
New Features
• Added support for forwarding missing color components when interpolating between analogous color spaces. (315569@main) (180239320)

sentences.en: Added support for forwarding missing color components when interpolating between analogous color spaces.
sentences.zh: 添加了对在类似颜色空间之间进行插值时转发丢失颜色分量的支持。

blocks.html_en: • Added support for the no-clamp option on the CSS progress() function. (315977@main) (180473472)

sentences.en: Added support for the no-clamp option on the CSS progress() function.
sentences.zh: 添加了对 CSS Progress() 函数上的 no-clamp 选项的支持。

blocks.html_en: Resolved Issues
• Fixed serialization of various CSS at-rules not escaping identifiers. (315795@main) (178750383)

sentences.en: Fixed serialization of various CSS at-rules not escaping identifiers.
sentences.zh: 修复了各种 CSS at 规则的序列化不转义标识符的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed :last-child and related selectors incorrectly gating on parser state outside of style resolution. (316495@main) (178879939)

sentences.en: Fixed :last-child and related selectors incorrectly gating on parser state outside of style resolution.
sentences.zh: 修复了 :last-child 和相关选择器错误地控制样式解析之外的解析器状态。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed changing the color-scheme of an <iframe> not invalidating the appearance of the embedded document. (316467@main) (179177141)

sentences.en: Fixed changing the color-scheme of an <iframe> not invalidating the appearance of the embedded document.
sentences.zh: 修复了更改 <iframe> 的颜色方案不会使嵌入文档的外观无效的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed CSS scroll snap re-snap to prefer the fragment-targeted (:target) snap area over other aligned snap targets. (315880@main) (180108825)

sentences.en: Fixed CSS scroll snap re-snap to prefer the fragment-targeted (:target) snap area over other aligned snap targets.
sentences.zh: 修复了 CSS 滚动捕捉重新捕捉，以优先选择片段目标 (:target) 捕捉区域而不是其他对齐的捕捉目标。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed the CSS preload scanner failing to preload @import rules that follow an @layer statement rule. (315576@main) (180170656)

sentences.en: Fixed the CSS preload scanner failing to preload @import rules that follow an @layer statement rule.
sentences.zh: 修复了 CSS 预加载扫描程序无法预加载遵循 @layer 语句规则的 @import 规则的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed serialization of CSSViewTransitionRule. (315614@main) (180170814)

sentences.zh: 修复了 CSSViewTransitionRule 的序列化。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed MediaList.deleteMedium() to parse its argument as a media query and remove all matching queries. (315579@main) (180270019)

sentences.en: Fixed MediaList.deleteMedium() to parse its argument as a media query and remove all matching queries.
sentences.zh: 修复了 MediaList.deleteMedium() 以将其参数解析为媒体查询并删除所有匹配的查询。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed MediaList.appendMedium() to parse its argument as a single media query and suppress duplicates. (315594@main) (180291283)

sentences.en: Fixed MediaList.appendMedium() to parse its argument as a single media query and suppress duplicates.
sentences.zh: 修复了 MediaList.appendMedium() 以将其参数解析为单个媒体查询并抑制重复项。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed grid items with stretch or fit-content preferred sizes computing incorrect minimum-content contributions when sizing tracks. (316296@main) (180748205)

sentences.en: Fixed grid items with stretch or fit-content preferred sizes computing incorrect minimum-content contributions when sizing tracks.
sentences.zh: 修复了具有拉伸或适合内容首选尺寸的网格项目，在调整轨道大小时计算不正确的最小内容贡献。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed inserting a CSS rule while a view transition is active causing the group animation to snap to its final state. (316436@main) (181100818)

sentences.en: Fixed inserting a CSS rule while a view transition is active causing the group animation to snap to its final state.
sentences.zh: 修复了在视图转换处于活动状态时插入 CSS 规则导致组动画捕捉到其最终状态的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed CSS var() to only resolve its fallback when the first argument resolves to the guaranteed-invalid value. (316280@main) (181114298)

sentences.en: Fixed CSS var() to only resolve its fallback when the first argument resolves to the guaranteed-invalid value.
sentences.zh: 修复了 CSS var() 以仅在第一个参数解析为保证无效值时解析其后备。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed navigating away from a render-blocked document before its first rendering opportunity incorrectly firing pagereveal and starting an outbound cross-document view transition. (316446@main) (181191512)

sentences.en: Fixed navigating away from a render-blocked document before its first rendering opportunity incorrectly firing pagereveal and starting an outbound cross-document view transition.
sentences.zh: 修复了在第一次渲染机会之前导航离开渲染阻止的文档错误地触发 pagereveal 并启动出站跨文档视图转换的问题。

blocks.html_en: Editing
Resolved Issues
• Fixed drag images of DOM elements with CSS transforms not rendering correctly. (316077@main) (99614217)

sentences.en: Fixed drag images of DOM elements with CSS transforms not rendering correctly.
sentences.zh: 修复了使用 CSS 变换的 DOM 元素的拖动图像无法正确渲染的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed opaque DOM mutations coming from dictation on iOS. (316049@main) (163454428)

sentences.en: Fixed opaque DOM mutations coming from dictation on iOS.
sentences.zh: 修复了 iOS 上听写引起的不透明 DOM 突变。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed deletion in an editable table leaving an empty trailing table row behind. (315990@main) (180877315)

sentences.en: Fixed deletion in an editable table leaving an empty trailing table row behind.
sentences.zh: 修复了可编辑表中的删除留下空尾随表行的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed vertical caret movement in editable content ignoring the requested editable-type parameter. (316241@main) (181000174)

sentences.en: Fixed vertical caret movement in editable content ignoring the requested editable-type parameter.
sentences.zh: 修复了可编辑内容中的垂直插入符移动，忽略了请求的可编辑类型参数。

blocks.html_en: Forms
Resolved Issues
• Fixed the concentric inner-button corner radius on horizontal text form controls incorrectly ignoring the bottom inset. (316022@main) (180869927)

sentences.en: Fixed the concentric inner-button corner radius on horizontal text form controls incorrectly ignoring the bottom inset.
sentences.zh: 修复了水平文本表单控件上的同心内按钮圆角半径错误地忽略底部插图的问题。

blocks.html_en: Images
Resolved Issues
• Fixed a regression where RGB gain map images were decoded to 8 bits per channel, causing a color shift and incorrect brightness. (316069@main) (179152566)

sentences.en: Fixed a regression where RGB gain map images were decoded to 8 bits per channel, causing a color shift and incorrect brightness.
sentences.zh: 修复了 RGB 增益图图像解码为每通道 8 位的回归问题，导致颜色偏移和亮度不正确。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed handling of the gain-map target pixel format when decoding HDR images to fall back safely when the format cannot be parsed. (316405@main) (181180757)

sentences.en: Fixed handling of the gain-map target pixel format when decoding HDR images to fall back safely when the format cannot be parsed.
sentences.zh: 修复了解码 HDR 图像时增益图目标像素格式的处理，以便在无法解析格式时安全回退。

blocks.html_en: JavaScript
New Features
• Added support for the TC39 BigInt Math proposal, exposing Math-equivalent methods on BigInt such as BigInt.pow and BigInt.sqrt. (315974@main) (152472996)

sentences.en: Added support for the TC39 BigInt Math proposal, exposing Math-equivalent methods on BigInt such as BigInt.pow and BigInt.sqrt.
sentences.zh: 添加了对 TC39 BigInt Math 提案的支持，公开 BigInt 上的数学等效方法，例如 BigInt.pow 和 BigInt.sqrt。

blocks.html_en: Media
Resolved Issues
• Fixed <audio> and <video> controls rendering incorrectly when rotated via CSS transform. (315718@main) (37516619)

sentences.en: Fixed <audio> and <video> controls rendering incorrectly when rotated via CSS transform.
sentences.zh: 修复了 <audio> 和 <video> 控件通过 CSS 变换旋转时渲染不正确的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed subtitles and closed captions not appearing in fullscreen video on iPhone. (315789@main) (175298523)

sentences.en: Fixed subtitles and closed captions not appearing in fullscreen video on iPhone.
sentences.zh: 修复了 iPhone 上全屏视频中不显示字幕和隐藏式字幕的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed ArrayBuffer-backed YUV VideoFrame with a visibleRect rendering with offset chroma channels. (315742@main) (180202939)

sentences.en: Fixed ArrayBuffer-backed YUV VideoFrame with a visibleRect rendering with offset chroma channels.
sentences.zh: 修复了 ArrayBuffer 支持的 YUV VideoFrame，其具有带有偏移色度通道的visibleRect 渲染。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed video playback of streams from certain sources such as security cameras not working. (315774@main) (180411019)

sentences.en: Fixed video playback of streams from certain sources such as security cameras not working.
sentences.zh: 修复了来自某些来源（例如安全摄像头）的流的视频播放无法正常工作的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed transient device rotation resulting in captured video frames having the wrong orientation. (315821@main) (180429147)

sentences.en: Fixed transient device rotation resulting in captured video frames having the wrong orientation.
sentences.zh: 修复了瞬态设备旋转导致捕获的视频帧方向错误的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed Media Source Extensions playback and seek by loosening the gap tolerance between buffered ranges. (316146@main) (180439090)

sentences.en: Fixed Media Source Extensions playback and seek by loosening the gap tolerance between buffered ranges.
sentences.zh: 通过放宽缓冲范围之间的间隙容差来修复媒体源扩展播放和搜索。

blocks.html_en: Navigation
Resolved Issues
• Fixed a <meta http-equiv="refresh"> to a URL differing only in fragment identifier being incorrectly treated as a page reload. (316001@main) (176933795)

sentences.en: Fixed a <meta http-equiv="refresh"> to a URL differing only in fragment identifier being incorrectly treated as a page reload.
sentences.zh: 修复了 <meta http-equiv="refresh"> 为仅片段标识符不同的 URL 的问题，该 URL 被错误地视为页面重新加载。

blocks.html_en: Networking
Resolved Issues
• Fixed URL path separators being encoded as %2F following a percent-encoded Armenian path segment. (315627@main) (180067095)

sentences.en: Fixed URL path separators being encoded as %2F following a percent-encoded Armenian path segment.
sentences.zh: 修复了在百分比编码的亚美尼亚路径段之后将 URL 路径分隔符编码为 %2F 的问题。

blocks.html_en: Rendering
Resolved Issues
• Fixed the background of a composited <html> element not being repainted when the <body> background changed. (316415@main) (177975964)

sentences.en: Fixed the background of a composited <html> element not being repainted when the <body> background changed.
sentences.zh: 修复了当 <body> 背景更改时合成的 <html> 元素的背景未重新绘制的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed a regression where block-axis padding on a flex column container with overflow: auto was excluded from scrollHeight. (315813@main) (179376053)

sentences.en: Fixed a regression where block-axis padding on a flex column container with overflow: auto was excluded from scrollHeight.
sentences.zh: 修复了带有溢出：auto 的弹性列容器上的块轴填充被从滚动高度中排除的回归。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed an issue where an <img> embedding an SVG with a near-integral intrinsic width rendered one device pixel narrower than expected. (315807@main) (180490343)

sentences.en: Fixed an issue where an embedding an SVG with a near-integral intrinsic width rendered one device pixel narrower than expected.
sentences.zh: 修复了嵌入具有接近整数固有宽度的 SVG 的 导致一个设备像素比预期窄的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed elements with filter: drop-shadow() not being fully repainted when a child is resized. (316450@main) (181284741)

sentences.en: Fixed elements with filter: drop-shadow() not being fully repainted when a child is resized.
sentences.zh: 修复了带有过滤器的元素：当调整子级大小时，drop-shadow() 不会完全重新绘制。

blocks.html_en: SVG
Resolved Issues
• Fixed SVG SMIL length animations to reject invalid to, from, and by values such as those with leading whitespace. (315949@main) (118537155)

sentences.en: Fixed SVG SMIL length animations to reject invalid to, from, and by values such as those with leading whitespace.
sentences.zh: 修复了 SVG SMIL 长度动画，以拒绝无效的 to、from 和 by 值，例如带有前导空格的值。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed Unicode text with complex scripts not rendering correctly along a curved <textPath>. (316144@main) (120284006)

sentences.en: Fixed Unicode text with complex scripts not rendering correctly along a curved <textPath>.
sentences.zh: 修复了具有复杂脚本的 Unicode 文本无法沿着弯曲的 <textPath> 正确呈现的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed SVGLength.convertToSpecifiedUnits() failing when converting from px to %, em, or ex. (315953@main) (172056830)

sentences.en: Fixed SVGLength.convertToSpecifiedUnits() failing when converting from px to %, em, or ex.
sentences.zh: 修复了从 px 转换为 %、em 或 ex 时 SVGLength.convertToSpecifiedUnits() 失败的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed SVG geometry presentation attributes like cx, cy, r, rx, ry, x, y, width, and height being incorrectly applied to elements such as <g> on which they are not permitted. (315946@main) (175672111)

sentences.en: Fixed SVG geometry presentation attributes like cx, cy, r, rx, ry, x, y, width, and height being incorrectly applied to elements such as <g> on which they are not permitted.
sentences.zh: 修复了 SVG 几何表示属性（例如 cx、cy、r、rx、ry、x、y、宽度和高度）错误地应用于不允许使用这些属性的元素（例如 <g>）。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed an issue where the per-character rotate attribute was discarded on a <textPath>, so it now composes with the path tangent angle. (315786@main) (178044478)

sentences.en: Fixed an issue where the per-character rotate attribute was discarded on a <textPath>, so it now composes with the path tangent angle.
sentences.zh: 修复了 <textPath> 上每个字符旋转属性被丢弃的问题，因此它现在与路径切线角度组合。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed several SVG styling spec-compliance failures. (316174@main) (181052042)

sentences.en: Fixed several SVG styling spec-compliance failures.
sentences.zh: 修复了多个 SVG 样式规范合规性失败的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed dynamic changes to orient and markerUnits on <marker> not repainting elements that reference it. (316350@main) (181106538)

sentences.en: Fixed dynamic changes to orient and markerUnits on <marker> not repainting elements that reference it.
sentences.zh: 修复了 <marker> 上的 orient 和 markUnits 的动态更改，而不是重新绘制引用它的元素。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed SVG SMIL number, integer-optional-integer, number-optional-number, and path animations to not apply when their from, to, or by values fail to parse. (316468@main) (181308150)

sentences.en: Fixed SVG SMIL number, integer-optional-integer, number-optional-number, and path animations to not apply when their from, to, or by values fail to parse.
sentences.zh: 修复了 SVG SMIL 数字、整数可选整数、数字可选数字和路径动画在其 from、to 或 by 值无法解析时不应用的问题。

blocks.html_en: Scrolling
Resolved Issues
• Fixed CSS scroll snap points inside zero-sized elements not working correctly. (315948@main) (172863699)

sentences.en: Fixed CSS scroll snap points inside zero-sized elements not working correctly.
sentences.zh: 修复了零大小元素内的 CSS 滚动捕捉点无法正常工作的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed CSS scroll snap re-snap to prefer a snap area that contains the focused or fragment-targeted element. (315927@main) (180707984)

sentences.en: Fixed CSS scroll snap re-snap to prefer a snap area that contains the focused or fragment-targeted element.
sentences.zh: 修复了 CSS 滚动捕捉重新捕捉以首选包含焦点或片段目标元素的捕捉区域。

blocks.html_en: Security
Resolved Issues
• Fixed a regression where some websites failed to display and logged Content Security Policy errors in the console. (316290@main) (179684592)

sentences.en: Fixed a regression where some websites failed to display and logged Content Security Policy errors in the console.
sentences.zh: 修复了某些网站无法在控制台中显示并记录内容安全策略错误的回归。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed same-page navigations being incorrectly checked against Content Security Policy. (315759@main) (180342503)

sentences.en: Fixed same-page navigations being incorrectly checked against Content Security Policy.
sentences.zh: 修复了根据内容安全策略错误检查同一页面导航的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed Content Security Policy frame-ancestors violations in report-only policies being ignored instead of reported. (315753@main) (180447621)

sentences.en: Fixed Content Security Policy frame-ancestors violations in report-only policies being ignored instead of reported.
sentences.zh: 修复了仅报告策略中的内容安全策略框架违规行为被忽略而不是报告的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed Content Security Policy parsing to reject trailing characters after the closing quote on nonce-source and hash-source values. (316008@main) (180903857)

sentences.en: Fixed Content Security Policy parsing to reject trailing characters after the closing quote on nonce-source and hash-source values.
sentences.zh: 修复了内容安全策略解析，以拒绝随机数源和哈希源值的结束引号后的尾随字符。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed Content Security Policy trusted-types expressions to reject trailing characters after keywords and the wildcard. (316089@main) (180973793)

sentences.en: Fixed Content Security Policy trusted-types expressions to reject trailing characters after keywords and the wildcard.
sentences.zh: 修复了内容安全策略可信类型表达式，以拒绝关键字和通配符后的尾随字符。

blocks.html_en: Storage
Resolved Issues
• Fixed an issue where IndexedDB transactions could be blocked for an extended period before starting when another page’s transaction was suspended in the background. (315609@main) (178769599)

sentences.en: Fixed an issue where IndexedDB transactions could be blocked for an extended period before starting when another page’s transaction was suspended in the background.
sentences.zh: 修复了当另一个页面的事务在后台暂停时，IndexedDB 事务在开始之前可能会被阻塞很长一段时间的问题。

blocks.html_en: Web API
Resolved Issues
• Fixed the Async Clipboard API to request paste access asynchronously. (315997@main) (75969974)

sentences.en: Fixed the Async Clipboard API to request paste access asynchronously.
sentences.zh: 修复了异步剪贴板 API 以请求异步粘贴访问。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed Digital Credentials to surface OperationError for platform-cancellation and unknown errors instead of AbortError or UnknownError. (315973@main) (174308268)

sentences.en: Fixed Digital Credentials to surface OperationError for platform-cancellation and unknown errors instead of AbortError or UnknownError.
sentences.zh: 修复了数字凭证以显示平台取消的操作错误和未知错误，而不是中止错误或未知错误。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed Digital Credentials rejecting with the wrong error code and synchronously; rejections are now queued as a task with the correct error. (315895@main) (174895437)

sentences.en: Fixed Digital Credentials rejecting with the wrong error code and synchronously; rejections are now queued as a task with the correct error.
sentences.zh: 修复了数字凭证因错误错误代码而同步拒绝的问题；拒绝现在作为具有正确错误的任务排队。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed KeyboardEvent.getModifierState("AltGraph") and MouseEvent.getModifierState("AltGraph") always returning false. (315804@main) (180597374)

sentences.en: Fixed KeyboardEvent.getModifierState("AltGraph") and MouseEvent.getModifierState("AltGraph") always returning false.
sentences.zh: 修复了 KeyboardEvent.getModifierState("AltGraph") 和 MouseEvent.getModifierState("AltGraph") 始终返回 false 的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed Credential.type returning "digital-credential" instead of "digital" for digital credentials. (315891@main) (180618646)

sentences.en: Fixed Credential.type returning "digital-credential" instead of "digital" for digital credentials.
sentences.zh: 修复了 Credential.type 返回数字凭据的“digital-credential”而不是“digital”的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed aborting navigator.credentials.get() leaving the digital-credentials document picker stuck on screen. (316494@main) (180812397)

sentences.en: Fixed aborting navigator.credentials.get() leaving the digital-credentials document picker stuck on screen.
sentences.zh: 修复了中止 navigator.credentials.get() 导致数字凭据文档选择器卡在屏幕上的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed FileReader.readAsText() ignoring the charset parameter of the Blob‘s MIME type. (315996@main) (180890703)

sentences.en: Fixed FileReader.readAsText() ignoring the charset parameter of the Blob‘s MIME type.
sentences.zh: 修复了 FileReader.readAsText() 忽略 Blob MIME 类型的字符集参数的问题。

blocks.html_en: Web Inspector
Resolved Issues
• Fixed showing ES2022 class private fields, methods, and accessors when inspecting object instances in the Console. (316171@main) (88527162)

sentences.en: Fixed showing ES2022 class private fields, methods, and accessors when inspecting object instances in the Console.
sentences.zh: 修复了在控制台中检查对象实例时显示 ES2022 类私有字段、方法和访问器的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed symbolic breakpoints in the debugger so they work with intrinsic functions. (315713@main) (99037335)

sentences.en: Fixed symbolic breakpoints in the debugger so they work with intrinsic functions.
sentences.zh: 修复了调试器中的符号断点，以便它们与内部函数一起使用。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed a JavaScript breakpoint on a line containing only a semicolon not being triggered. (316519@main) (126707973)

sentences.en: Fixed a JavaScript breakpoint on a line containing only a semicolon not being triggered.
sentences.zh: 修复了仅包含分号的行上未触发的 JavaScript 断点。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed the Console REPL to allow redefinition of variables declared with let and const. (316523@main) (143140659)

sentences.en: Fixed the Console REPL to allow redefinition of variables declared with let and const.
sentences.zh: 修复了控制台 REPL，以允许重新定义使用 let 和 const 声明的变量。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed the Timeline exporting and importing the wrong timestamp for performance.mark() records. (316073@main) (145226764)

sentences.en: Fixed the Timeline exporting and importing the wrong timestamp for performance.mark() records.
sentences.zh: 修复了时间轴导出和导入 Performance.mark() 记录的错误时间戳。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed local response overrides mapped to a file being interpreted as Latin-1 (ISO-8859-1) instead of their actual encoding. (316074@main) (149847746)

sentences.en: Fixed local response overrides mapped to a file being interpreted as Latin-1 (ISO-8859-1) instead of their actual encoding.
sentences.zh: 修复了映射到被解释为 Latin-1 (ISO-8859-1) 而不是其实际编码的文件的本地响应覆盖。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed the Media Logging setting not persisting across page loads. (315758@main) (154766890)

sentences.en: Fixed the Media Logging setting not persisting across page loads.
sentences.zh: 修复了媒体记录设置在页面加载时不保留的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed symbolic breakpoints to work with native constructors such as Array, Date, EventTarget, and Worker. (316262@main) (157178256)

sentences.en: Fixed symbolic breakpoints to work with native constructors such as Array, Date, EventTarget, and Worker.
sentences.zh: 修复了符号断点以与本机构造函数（例如 Array、Date、EventTarget 和 Worker）配合使用。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed missing stack traces for MIME type errors when importing modules. (316529@main) (169396940)

sentences.en: Fixed missing stack traces for MIME type errors when importing modules.
sentences.zh: 修复了导入模块时缺少 MIME 类型错误的堆栈跟踪。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed the Accessibility sidebar being empty for nodes inside cross-origin iframes. (316399@main) (178562336)

sentences.en: Fixed the Accessibility sidebar being empty for nodes inside cross-origin iframes.
sentences.zh: 修复了跨源 iframe 内的节点的辅助功能侧边栏为空的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed inline style invalidation to batch DOM.getAttributes commands per tick in cross-origin iframes instead of issuing one command per node. (316487@main) (178830496)

sentences.en: Fixed inline style invalidation to batch DOM.getAttributes commands per tick in cross-origin iframes instead of issuing one command per node.
sentences.zh: 修复了内联样式失效问题，以在跨源 iframe 中按每个刻度批量处理 DOM.getAttributes 命令，而不是为每个节点发出一个命令。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed DOM Storage read and write commands to resolve against the frame’s own origin in cross-origin iframes. (316501@main) (179249711)

sentences.en: Fixed DOM Storage read and write commands to resolve against the frame’s own origin in cross-origin iframes.
sentences.zh: 修复了 DOM 存储读取和写入命令，以解析跨源 iframe 中框架自身的源。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed a moved breakpoint reverting to its original location after closing and reopening Web Inspector. (315585@main) (180083858)

sentences.en: Fixed a moved breakpoint reverting to its original location after closing and reopening Web Inspector.
sentences.zh: 修复了关闭并重新打开 Web Inspector 后移动的断点恢复到其原始位置的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed showing the formatted parameters string for prototype objects such as Map.prototype. (315599@main) (180298712)

sentences.en: Fixed showing the formatted parameters string for prototype objects such as Map.prototype.
sentences.zh: 修复了显示原型对象（例如 Map.prototype）的格式化参数字符串的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed missing formatted parameter strings for object shorthand methods and arrow functions. (315723@main) (180466459)

sentences.en: Fixed missing formatted parameter strings for object shorthand methods and arrow functions.
sentences.zh: 修复了对象速记方法和箭头函数丢失的格式化参数字符串。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed an unnecessary colon appearing in front of non-class function properties. (315731@main) (180476445)

sentences.en: Fixed an unnecessary colon appearing in front of non-class function properties.
sentences.zh: 修复了非类函数属性前面出现不必要的冒号。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed a self-canceling ternary that produced an incorrect cross-axis direction in the flex overlay. (316429@main) (181198803)

sentences.en: Fixed a self-canceling ternary that produced an incorrect cross-axis direction in the flex overlay.
sentences.zh: 修复了在柔性覆盖层中产生不正确的横轴方向的自取消三元。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed the color picker force-converting picked colors to Display P3. (316419@main) (181201503)

sentences.en: Fixed the color picker force-converting picked colors to Display P3.
sentences.zh: 修复了颜色选择器将拾取的颜色强制转换为显示 P3 的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed Page.searchInResources silently omitting cache-backed resources from search results. (316421@main) (181202027)

sentences.en: Fixed Page.searchInResources silently omitting cache-backed resources from search results.
sentences.zh: 修复了 Page.searchInResources 从搜索结果中静默忽略缓存支持的资源的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed duplicate invalid CSS declarations both incorrectly displaying as Active in the Styles sidebar. (316418@main) (181203080)

sentences.en: Fixed duplicate invalid CSS declarations both incorrectly displaying as Active in the Styles sidebar.
sentences.zh: 修复了重复的无效 CSS 声明在样式侧栏中错误地显示为“活动”的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed adopted constructable stylesheets being misclassified as User Agent stylesheets in cross-origin iframes. (316433@main) (181204768)

sentences.en: Fixed adopted constructable stylesheets being misclassified as User Agent stylesheets in cross-origin iframes.
sentences.zh: 修复了采用的可构造样式表在跨源 iframe 中被错误分类为用户代理样式表的问题。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed an unsigned underflow that caused the DOM agent to spuriously report power-efficient playback. (316443@main) (181205602)

sentences.en: Fixed an unsigned underflow that caused the DOM agent to spuriously report power-efficient playback.
sentences.zh: 修复了导致 DOM 代理错误报告节能播放的未签名下溢。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed Network.setExtraHTTPHeaders to replace previously set headers instead of accumulating them. (316444@main) (181282814)

sentences.en: Fixed Network.setExtraHTTPHeaders to replace previously set headers instead of accumulating them.
sentences.zh: 修复了 Network.setExtraHTTPHeaders 以替换以前设置的标头而不是累积它们。

blocks.html_en: WebDriver
New Features
• Added WebDriver support for the Digital Credentials API, including commands to simulate wallet payloads, indefinite waits, and user rejection. (316435@main) (168941907)

sentences.en: Added WebDriver support for the Digital Credentials API, including commands to simulate wallet payloads, indefinite waits, and user rejection.
sentences.zh: 添加了对数字凭证 API 的 WebDriver 支持，包括模拟钱包有效负载、无限期等待和用户拒绝的命令。

blocks.html_en: WebRTC
Resolved Issues
• Fixed the WebProcess AudioSession to remain active while microphone capture is live. (316394@main) (180505014)

sentences.en: Fixed the WebProcess AudioSession to remain active while microphone capture is live.
sentences.zh: 修复了 WebProcess AudioSession，使其在麦克风捕获实时时保持活动状态。

blocks.html_en: • Fixed the configurationchange event being dropped when a source-side change occurred while a MediaStreamTrack was muted; the event is now deferred until unmute. (316301@main) (180728609)

sentences.en: Fixed the configurationchange event being dropped when a source-side change occurred while a MediaStreamTrack was muted; the event is now deferred until unmute.
sentences.zh: 修复了 MediaStreamTrack 静音时发生源端更改时丢弃的配置更改事件；该事件现在推迟到取消静音为止。

content_html_zh:
Safari 技术预览版 248 现已可供 macOS Golden Gate 和 macOS Tahoe 下载。 如果您已经安装了 Safari 技术预览版，您可以在“系统设置”中的“常规”→“软件更新”下进行更新。

此版本包括以下 WebKit 更改：315567@main…316817@main。

无障碍

已解决的问题

  • 修复了 Safari 上的 VoiceOver 无法导航到使用 hide="until-found" 的公开小部件显示的内容的问题。 (315964@主) (173228707)
  • 当引用的元素动态更改其 aria-label 时，修复了过时的 aria-labelledby。 (316316@主) (180319221)

CSS

新功能

  • 添加了对在类似颜色空间之间进行插值时转发丢失颜色分量的支持。 (315569@主) (180239320)
  • 添加了对 CSS Progress() 函数上的 no-clamp 选项的支持。 (315977@主) (180473472)

已解决的问题

  • 修复了各种 CSS at 规则的序列化不转义标识符的问题。 (315795@主) (178750383)
  • 修复了 :last-child 和相关选择器错误地控制样式解析之外的解析器状态。 (316495@主) (178879939)
  • 修复了更改 <iframe> 的颜色方案不会使嵌入文档的外观无效的问题。 (316467@主) (179177141)
  • 修复了 CSS 滚动捕捉重新捕捉，以优先选择片段目标 (:target) 捕捉区域而不是其他对齐的捕捉目标。 (315880@主) (180108825)
  • 修复了 CSS 预加载扫描程序无法预加载遵循 @layer 语句规则的 @import 规则的问题。 (315576@主) (180170656)
  • 修复了 CSSViewTransitionRule 的序列化。 (315614@主) (180170814)
  • 修复了 MediaList.deleteMedium() 以将其参数解析为媒体查询并删除所有匹配的查询。 (315579@主) (180270019)
  • 修复了 MediaList.appendMedium() 以将其参数解析为单个媒体查询并抑制重复项。 (315594@主) (180291283)
  • 修复了具有拉伸或适合内容首选尺寸的网格项目，在调整轨道大小时计算不正确的最小内容贡献。 (316296@主) (180748205)
  • 修复了在视图转换处于活动状态时插入 CSS 规则导致组动画捕捉到其最终状态的问题。 (316436@主) (181100818)
  • 修复了 CSS var() 以仅在第一个参数解析为保证无效值时解析其后备。 (316280@主) (181114298)
  • 修复了在第一次渲染机会之前导航离开渲染阻止的文档错误地触发 pagereveal 并启动出站跨文档视图转换的问题。 (316446@主) (181191512)

编辑

已解决的问题

  • 修复了使用 CSS 变换的 DOM 元素的拖动图像无法正确渲染的问题。 (316077@主) (99614217)
  • 修复了 iOS 上听写引起的不透明 DOM 突变。 (316049@主) (163454428)
  • 修复了可编辑表中的删除留下空尾随表行的问题。 (315990@主) (180877315)
  • 修复了可编辑内容中的垂直插入符移动，忽略了请求的可编辑类型参数。 (316241@主) (181000174)

Forms

已解决的问题

  • 修复了水平文本表单控件上的同心内按钮圆角半径错误地忽略底部插图的问题。 (316022@主) (180869927)

图片

已解决的问题

  • 修复了 RGB 增益图图像解码为每通道 8 位的回归问题，导致颜色偏移和亮度不正确。 (316069@主) (179152566)
  • 修复了解码 HDR 图像时增益图目标像素格式的处理，以便在无法解析格式时安全回退。 (316405@主) (181180757)

JavaScript

新功能

  • 添加了对 TC39 BigInt Math 提案的支持，公开 BigInt 上的数学等效方法，例如 BigInt.pow 和 BigInt.sqrt。 (315974@主) (152472996)

Media

已解决的问题

  • 修复了 <audio> 和 <video> 控件通过 CSS 变换旋转时渲染不正确的问题。 (315718@主) (37516619)
  • 修复了 iPhone 上全屏视频中不显示字幕和隐藏式字幕的问题。 (315789@主) (175298523)
  • 修复了 ArrayBuffer 支持的 YUV VideoFrame，其具有带有偏移色度通道的visibleRect 渲染。 (315742@主) (180202939)
  • 修复了来自某些来源（例如安全摄像头）的流的视频播放无法正常工作的问题。 (315774@主) (180411019)
  • 修复了瞬态设备旋转导致捕获的视频帧方向错误的问题。 (315821@主) (180429147)
  • 通过放宽缓冲范围之间的间隙容差来修复媒体源扩展播放和搜索。 (316146@主) (180439090)

导航

已解决的问题

  • 修复了 <meta http-equiv="refresh"> 为仅片段标识符不同的 URL 的问题，该 URL 被错误地视为页面重新加载。 (316001@主) (176933795)

联网

已解决的问题

  • 修复了在百分比编码的亚美尼亚路径段之后将 URL 路径分隔符编码为 %2F 的问题。 (315627@主) (180067095)

渲染

已解决的问题

  • 修复了当 <body> 背景更改时合成的 <html> 元素的背景未重新绘制的问题。 (316415@主) (177975964)
  • 修复了带有溢出：auto 的弹性列容器上的块轴填充被从滚动高度中排除的回归。 (315813@主) (179376053)
  • 修复了嵌入具有接近整数固有宽度的 SVG 的 <img> 导致一个设备像素比预期窄的问题。 (315807@主) (180490343)
  • 修复了带有过滤器的元素：当调整子级大小时，drop-shadow() 不会完全重新绘制。 (316450@主) (181284741)

SVG

已解决的问题

  • 修复了 SVG SMIL 长度动画，以拒绝无效的 to、from 和 by 值，例如带有前导空格的值。 (315949@主) (118537155)
  • 修复了具有复杂脚本的 Unicode 文本无法沿着弯曲的 <textPath> 正确呈现的问题。 (316144@主) (120284006)
  • 修复了从 px 转换为 %、em 或 ex 时 SVGLength.convertToSpecifiedUnits() 失败的问题。 (315953@主) (172056830)
  • 修复了 SVG 几何表示属性（例如 cx、cy、r、rx、ry、x、y、宽度和高度）错误地应用于不允许使用这些属性的元素（例如 <g>）。 (315946@主) (175672111)
  • 修复了 <textPath> 上每个字符旋转属性被丢弃的问题，因此它现在与路径切线角度组合。 (315786@主) (178044478)
  • 修复了多个 SVG 样式规范合规性失败的问题。 (316174@主) (181052042)
  • 修复了 <marker> 上的 orient 和 markUnits 的动态更改，而不是重新绘制引用它的元素。 (316350@总机) (181106538)
  • 修复了 SVG SMIL 数字、整数可选整数、数字可选数字和路径动画在其 from、to 或 by 值无法解析时不应用的问题。 (316468@主) (181308150)

滚动

已解决的问题

  • 修复了零大小元素内的 CSS 滚动捕捉点无法正常工作的问题。 (315948@主) (172863699)
  • 修复了 CSS 滚动捕捉重新捕捉以首选包含焦点或片段目标元素的捕捉区域。 (315927@主) (180707984)

安全

已解决的问题

  • 修复了某些网站无法在控制台中显示并记录内容安全策略错误的回归。 (316290@主) (179684592)
  • 修复了根据内容安全策略错误检查同一页面导航的问题。 (315759@主) (180342503)
  • 修复了仅报告策略中的内容安全策略框架违规行为被忽略而不是报告的问题。 (315753@主) (180447621)
  • 修复了内容安全策略解析，以拒绝随机数源和哈希源值的结束引号后的尾随字符。 (316008@主) (180903857)
  • 修复了内容安全策略可信类型表达式，以拒绝关键字和通配符后的尾随字符。 (316089@主) (180973793)

贮存

已解决的问题

  • 修复了当另一个页面的事务在后台暂停时，IndexedDB 事务在开始之前可能会被阻塞很长一段时间的问题。 (315609@主) (178769599)

网络 API

已解决的问题

  • 修复了异步剪贴板 API 以请求异步粘贴访问。 (315997@主) (75969974)
  • 修复了数字凭证以显示平台取消的操作错误和未知错误，而不是中止错误或未知错误。 (315973@主) (174308268)
  • 修复了数字凭证因错误错误代码而同步拒绝的问题；拒绝现在作为具有正确错误的任务排队。 (315895@主) (174895437)
  • 修复了 KeyboardEvent.getModifierState("AltGraph") 和 MouseEvent.getModifierState("AltGraph") 始终返回 false 的问题。 (315804@主) (180597374)
  • 修复了 Credential.type 返回数字凭据的“digital-credential”而不是“digital”的问题。 (315891@主) (180618646)
  • 修复了中止 navigator.credentials.get() 导致数字凭据文档选择器卡在屏幕上的问题。 (316494@主) (180812397)
  • 修复了 FileReader.readAsText() 忽略 Blob MIME 类型的字符集参数的问题。 (315996@主) (180890703)

网页检查器

已解决的问题

  • 修复了在控制台中检查对象实例时显示 ES2022 类私有字段、方法和访问器的问题。 (316171@主) (88527162)
  • 修复了调试器中的符号断点，以便它们与内部函数一起使用。 (315713@主) (99037335)
  • 修复了仅包含分号的行上未触发的 JavaScript 断点。 (316519@主) (126707973)
  • 修复了控制台 REPL，以允许重新定义使用 let 和 const 声明的变量。 (316523@主) (143140659)
  • 修复了时间轴导出和导入 Performance.mark() 记录的错误时间戳。 (316073@主) (145226764)
  • 修复了映射到被解释为 Latin-1 (ISO-8859-1) 而不是其实际编码的文件的本地响应覆盖。 (316074@主) (149847746)
  • 修复了媒体记录设置在页面加载时不保留的问题。 (315758@主) (154766890)
  • 修复了符号断点以与本机构造函数（例如 Array、Date、EventTarget 和 Worker）配合使用。 (316262@主) (157178256)
  • 修复了导入模块时缺少 MIME 类型错误的堆栈跟踪。 (316529@主) (169396940)
  • 修复了跨源 iframe 内的节点的辅助功能侧边栏为空的问题。 (316399@主) (178562336)
  • 修复了内联样式失效问题，以在跨源 iframe 中按每个刻度批量处理 DOM.getAttributes 命令，而不是为每个节点发出一个命令。 (316487@主) (178830496)
  • 修复了 DOM 存储读取和写入命令，以解析跨源 iframe 中框架自身的源。 (316501@主) (179249711)
  • 修复了关闭并重新打开 Web Inspector 后移动的断点恢复到其原始位置的问题。 (315585@主) (180083858)
  • 修复了显示原型对象（例如 Map.prototype）的格式化参数字符串的问题。 (315599@主) (180298712)
  • 修复了对象速记方法和箭头函数丢失的格式化参数字符串。 (315723@主) (180466459)
  • 修复了非类函数属性前面出现不必要的冒号。 (315731@主) (180476445)
  • 修复了在柔性覆盖层中产生不正确的横轴方向的自取消三元。 (316429@主) (181198803)
  • 修复了颜色选择器将拾取的颜色强制转换为显示 P3 的问题。 (316419@主) (181201503)
  • 修复了 Page.searchInResources 从搜索结果中静默忽略缓存支持的资源的问题。 (316421@主) (181202027)
  • 修复了重复的无效 CSS 声明在样式侧栏中错误地显示为“活动”的问题。 (316418@主) (181203080)
  • 修复了采用的可构造样式表在跨源 iframe 中被错误分类为用户代理样式表的问题。 (316433@主) (181204768)
  • 修复了导致 DOM 代理错误报告节能播放的未签名下溢。 (316443@主) (181205602)
  • 修复了 Network.setExtraHTTPHeaders 以替换以前设置的标头而不是累积它们。 (316444@主) (181282814)

网络驱动程序

新功能

  • 添加了对数字凭证 API 的 WebDriver 支持，包括模拟钱包有效负载、无限期等待和用户拒绝的命令。 (316435@主) (168941907)

网络RTC

已解决的问题

  • 修复了 WebProcess AudioSession，使其在麦克风捕获实时时保持活动状态。 (316394@主) (180505014)
  • 修复了 MediaStreamTrack 静音时发生源端更改时丢弃的配置更改事件；该事件现在推迟到取消静音为止。 (316301@主) (180728609)
